body.title: Layer 3 brick: SITUATE engram
body.result: All 8 Layer 3 TEMPLATE nodes seeded with full tests (1305 passing). Session 2026-04-01h.
body.description: Design and seed SITUATE as a TEMPLATE Memory node. Searches cortex for relevant memories given goal/context in basket, pushes results to TWM. Emits situate_confidence to basket. Layer 3 cognitive stdlib (D297).
